title: Smoky Fish Fry
description: A simple and flavorful fish dish cooked with smoky flavor and gooey texture. This recipe is perfect for a quick dinner or lunch.

ingredients.name: Fish Fillets
ingredients.notes: any firm white fish works well

ingredients.name: Gooey Sauce
ingredients.notes: see below for gooey sauce recipe

ingredients.name: Smoky Stir Fry
ingredients.notes: see below for smoky stir fry recipe

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the fish fillets with salt and pepper.
Add the fish to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
While the fish is cooking, heat the smoky stir fry in a small saucepan over low heat.
Stir in the gooey sauce and heat until warmed through.
Serve the fish topped with the smoky stir fry and gooey sauce.
